flasherPage.downloadBlocked: Select a programmer connection and load firmware first.
flasherPage.selectTargetAndFlasher: Select a target and programmer first.
flasherPage.flashNotImplemented: This programmer does not implement flashing yet.
flasherPage.noConnectionNeeded: This programmer does not require a connection step.
flasherPage.deviceSelectionTimeout: Device selection timed out. Retry and confirm or cancel in the chooser.

firmware.minRowsNotMet: Select firmware for enough rows to satisfy the minimum segment count
firmware.dragHint: Choose a firmware file or drag it here
firmware.addressResolvedHint: Flash address comes from Intel HEX or the chip default base; not editable here.
firmware.slotRequired: Select a file for each required slot
firmware.hexMultiSlotHint: Use .bin per slot for multi-segment flashing. Intel HEX is only supported for a single app slot.
firmware.elfNotImplemented: ELF files are not supported yet

overlay.bodyWithName: Please use Chrome, Edge, Arc, or similar browsers to visit this site.
overlay.copyFailed: Could not copy. Copy the address from the bar manually.
overlay.openHint: If the page does not open automatically, copy the link and open it in the corresponding browser.
overlay.invalidPageUrlForSchemes: This address is not http/https, so one-click links cannot be built. Use the copy action instead.

esp.flashPlanInvalid: Invalid ESP32 firmware payload or missing data. Re-select a .bin/.hex file.
esp.probeFailed: ESP32 probe/connection failed. Check boot mode, wiring, and baud rate.
esp.connectionFailed: ESP32 serial session not established. Reselect the device and retry.
esp.flashFailed: ESP32 flash write failed. Check connection stability and image addresses.
esp.resetFailed: ESP32 reset failed. Try the reset button or power cycle.

dfu.probeFailed: DFU probe failed. Ensure device is in DFU mode.
dfu.syncFailed: Failed to synchronize DFU state. Reconnect and retry.
dfu.eraseFailed: DFU erase failed. Check target address and protection state.
dfu.flashFailed: DFU write failed. Check USB connection stability and retry.
dfu.resetFailed: DFU reset/detach failed. You may need to replug device manually.

baudRate.label: Baud rate
baudRate.help: Must match Web Serial open speed; common: 460800 / 921600

debugInterface.label: Debug interface
debugInterface.help: Choose SWD or JTAG transport mode

debugClockHz.label: Debug clock (Hz)
debugClockHz.help: ST-Link debug clock frequency; too high may be unstable
